Class MoveGoodCommand

java.lang.Object
Controller.Commands.Command
Controller.Commands.MoveGoodCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class MoveGoodCommand extends Command
Command for moving goods between cargo holds. Used during cargo management phases.
See Also:

    private final int
    oldIndex
    The index of the good in the source cargo hold

  • Constructor Details

    • MoveGoodCommand

      public MoveGoodCommand(String playerName, Coordinates oldCoordinates, Coordinates newCoordinates, int oldIndex, int newIndex)
      Constructs a new MoveGoodsCommand.
      Parameters:
      playerName - the name of the player moving goods
      oldCoordinates - the source coordinates
      newCoordinates - the destination coordinates
      oldIndex - the source index
      newIndex - the destination index

  • Method Details

    • execute

      public void execute(Controller controller) throws InvalidCommand, InvalidParameters, InvalidContextualAction
      Executes the move goods command by calling the controller's moveGood method.
      Specified by:
      execute in class Command
      Parameters:
      controller - the controller to execute the command on
      Throws:
      InvalidCommand
      InvalidParameters
      InvalidContextualAction
